charts.caller-untrusted: unauthenticated inbound requests (triggers, webhooks) before verification
charts.team-scoped: data scoped to a single team principal
charts.trigger-verified: an authenticated, well-formed trigger admitted to the enqueue path

sharedSecretVerifier.translates: an inbound shared-secret request into a single team-scoped principal; no per-caller identity can be smuggled behind the secret

TRIGGER_MODULES.translates: a raw inbound trigger into a verified one — content-type, drop, dedup, and signing enforced per module (double-entry over the edge classes)

nonTransition.enqueueOrResume: enqueue idempotency — a redelivered event collapses to the original session; liveness within the enqueue chart
